overview: 318 Prime T Health specializes in testosterone replacement therapy using comprehensive blood panels and personalized treatment plans. Care is delivered conveniently with phone follow-up consultations and home medication delivery.
highlights: Extensive blood panels for comprehensive health assessment
Personalized treatment plans rather than one-size-fits-all approach
Remote consultations with home medication delivery
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone replacement therapy, and women interested in medically assisted weight loss or peptide therapy.
